-- Use the category of natural numbers with ≤ as morphisms (preorder category)
  -- and the terminal category (Unit with trivial category)
  use ℕ, Unit
  use Category.Preorder ℕ, Category.Terminal
  -- Functor to terminal category
  let F : Functor ℕ Unit := {
    F := fun _ => ()
    homF := fun _ => ()
    map_id := fun _ => rfl
    map_comp := fun _ _ => rfl
  }
  use F
  use 0, 1
  use ⟨Nat.zero_le 1⟩
  constructor
  · intro ⟨g, hg, _⟩
    -- g : PLift (1 ≤ 0), which is impossible
    exact Nat.not_succ_le_zero 0 g.down
  · use ()
    constructor <;> rfl

simp
    comp := fun {X Y Z} f g => by
      simp only at f g ⊢
      split_ifs <;> try exact ()
      all_goals (try exact Empty.elim f; try exact Empty.elim g)
    id_comp := fun {X Y} f => by simp only at f ⊢; split_ifs <;> rfl
    comp_id := fun {X Y} f => by simp only at f ⊢; split_ifs <;> rfl
    assoc := fun {W X Y Z} f g h => by simp only at f g h ⊢; split_ifs <;> rfl
  }

since true ≠ false
  constructor
  · intro ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩
    have : true = false := by
      calc true = (fun b => b) (g false) := by rw [hgf]; rfl
        _ = g false := rfl
        _ = g ((fun b => b) true) := rfl
        _ = (g ∘ (fun b => b)) true := rfl
        _ = (id true) := by rw [hfg]; rfl
        _ = true := rfl
    exact Bool.noConfusion this
  · use id ()
    constructor <;> rfl

simp
    comp := fun {X Y Z} f g => by
      simp only at f g ⊢
      split_ifs at f g ⊢ <;> try exact ()
      all_goals (try exact f; try exact g; try exact Empty.elim f; try exact Empty.elim g)
      · obtain ⟨_, hY⟩ := ‹X = false ∧ Y = true›
        obtain ⟨hY', _⟩ := ‹Y = false ∧ Z = true›
        simp_all
      · obtain ⟨_, hY⟩ := ‹X = false ∧ Y = true›
        have hYZ : Y = Z := ‹Y = Z›
        simp_all
      · obtain ⟨hX, _⟩ := ‹X = false ∧ Z = true›
        have hXY : X = Y := ‹X = Y›
        obtain ⟨hY, _⟩ := ‹Y = false ∧ Z = true›
        simp_all
    id_comp := by intros; rfl
    comp_id := by intros; rfl
    assoc := by intros; rfl
  }
  use Category.Discrete Unit
  use {
    F := fun _ => ()
    homF := fun _ => Category.id ()
    map_id := fun _ => rfl
    map_comp := fun _ _ => by simp [Category.id, comp_id]
  }
  use false, true
  use ()
  constructor
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩ := h
    simp at g
  · use Category.id ()
    simp [Category.id, id_comp, comp_id]

source
  -- and a terminal category (Unit) as target
  use Bool, Unit, Category.Preorder Bool, Category.Discrete Unit
  let F : Functor Bool Unit := {
    F := fun _ => ()
    homF := fun _ => ()
    map_id := fun _ => rfl
    map_comp := fun _ _ => rfl
  }
  use F, false, true
  use ⟨le_of_lt Bool.false_lt_true⟩
  constructor
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩ := h
    have : True ≤ False := g.down
    exact Bool.false_ne_true (le_antisymm (le_of_lt Bool.false_lt_true) this)
  · use ()
    constructor <;> rfl

use Bool, Unit
  use Category.Discrete Bool, Category.Discrete Unit
  let F : Functor Bool Unit := {
    F := fun _ => ()
    homF := fun f => PLift.up rfl
    map_id := fun _ => rfl

  use F

  constructor
  · intro ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩
    have : false = true := g.down (rfl : true = true)
    exact Bool.false_ne_true this
  · use PLift.up rfl
    constructor <;> rfl
